name: TabbedOut
description: Lowers FPS and can mute music or SFX while Geometry Dash is unfocused.

limit-fps-when-unfocused.name: Limit FPS When Unfocused
limit-fps-when-unfocused.description: Drops the game's frame rate while the window is unfocused.

unfocused-fps.name: Unfocused FPS
unfocused-fps.description: Target FPS while Geometry Dash is tabbed out.

mute-music-when-unfocused.name: Mute Music When Unfocused
mute-music-when-unfocused.description: Sets the music volume to 0 while the game is unfocused.

mute-sfx-when-unfocused.name: Mute SFX When Unfocused
mute-sfx-when-unfocused.description: Sets the effects volume to 0 while the game is unfocused.

show-focus-notifications.name: Show Focus Notifications
show-focus-notifications.description: Shows a small Geode notification when TabbedOut turns on or off.
